questions: What is the name of the technology or material?
What type of supplementary cementitious material (SCM) is it?
What organization(s) or company(ies) developed or supply the material?
What is the current technology readiness level (TRL) or deployment stage?
How is the SCM produced or sourced?
What conventional material does it replace (e.g., Portland cement clinker)?
What is the typical replacement rate or blend ratio?
What is the reported reduction in greenhouse gas emissions (%)?
What is the absolute emissions intensity (kg CO₂e per unit product)?
How does the SCM affect concrete performance (strength, durability, setting time)?
What are the supply chain or geographic availability constraints?
What is the cost premium or cost savings relative to conventional materials?
Has the material been deployed commercially?
What evidence supports the reported claims?
What information is missing or uncertain?
